assertions.expectation: Uses 'no upgrades' exclusion (30-day max) for the BFCM period — blocks everything including patches
assertions.reason: The response shows November exclusion dates from Nov 20-30 (11 days) but doesn't use the correct --add-maintenance-exclusion-scope=NO_UPGRADES flag in gcloud commands, and doesn't mention the 30-day maximum limit for NO_UPGRADES exclusions

assertions.expectation: Uses 'no upgrades' exclusion for the June code freeze period
assertions.reason: While the response includes June exclusion configuration, it doesn't properly use the --add-maintenance-exclusion-scope=NO_UPGRADES flag in the gcloud commands and doesn't specify this exclusion type clearly

assertions.expectation: For permanent minor version control: uses 'no minor upgrades' (scope 'no_minor') if they only want to block minor versions, or 'no minor or node upgrades' (scope 'no_minor_or_node') if they also want to stop node upgrades. May recommend persistent exclusion with --add-maintenance-exclusion-until-end-of-support which auto-tracks EoS date
assertions.reason: The response doesn't use the correct maintenance exclusion scopes (no_minor or no_minor_or_node) for permanent minor version control. Instead, it relies on auto_upgrade=false which is a different mechanism. It also doesn't mention --add-maintenance-exclusion-until-end-of-support

assertions.expectation: Notes the 30-day maximum for 'no upgrades' exclusions vs up-to-EoS for 'no minor or node upgrades'
assertions.reason: The response doesn't mention the 30-day maximum limit for NO_UPGRADES exclusions or the difference in duration limits between exclusion types

assertions.expectation: Provides specific gcloud commands with --add-maintenance-exclusion-scope flags for each exclusion type
assertions.reason: While gcloud commands are provided, they don't properly use the --add-maintenance-exclusion-scope flags with the correct values (NO_UPGRADES, no_minor, no_minor_or_node)

assertions.expectation: Notes that you can have a maximum of three 'no upgrades' exclusions, and they must allow 48h of maintenance in any 32-day window
assertions.reason: The response doesn't mention the maximum of three NO_UPGRADES exclusions or the requirement to allow 48 hours of maintenance in any 32-day window

assertions.expectation: Mentions that manual upgrades bypass maintenance windows — only auto-upgrades respect them
assertions.reason: The response doesn't explain that manual upgrades bypass maintenance windows and exclusions, only mentioning manual upgrade commands without this important distinction

assertions.expectation: Warns about the risk of falling too far behind on versions during extended exclusion periods
assertions.reason: The response doesn't warn about the risks of falling behind on versions during extended exclusion periods or the security implications
